title: Jinx Money
writer: Edmond Seward, Tim Ryan, Gerald Schnitzer
actors: Leo Gorcey, Huntz Hall, Gabriel Dell
plot: A man wins $50, 000 in a card game with gamblers, but is soon found dead and the money missing. Slip and Sach find the money near where the body was discovered, and soon find themselves the target of both the police and the gamblers.
